question: What is the main subject of the image? Select from the following options: (A) A person dancing on stage. (B) A group of people playing music in a dark room. (C) A person playing a guitar on stage. (D) A person singing with a microphone on stage.
gold_answer: A group of people playing music in a dark room
answer_choices: A group of people playing music in a dark room
A person playing a guitar on stage
A person singing with a microphone on stage
